hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "jcodemunch is available. Use resolve_repo, search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, get_context_bundle — NOT Grep/Read — for code exploration."}'
echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Grep and Glob are blocked. Use jcodemunch tools instead: search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, or get_context_bundle."}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: Prefer jcodemunch tools (search_symbols, get_file_outline, find_references, get_context_bundle) over Read for code exploration. Only use Read for targeted reads of known file locations or editing workflows."}}'
